stints.notes: Norway's first World Cup since 2000-01 qualifying era; Haaland's first-ever World Cup appearance. Group I with France, Senegal, Iraq. Norway already through to Round of 32 after beating Senegal 3-2.

Perfect qualifying campaign: 8 wins, 0 draws, 0 losses, 37 goals for, 5 against. Included an 11-1 win over Moldova (Haaland scored 5) and a decisive 4-1 win away in Milan vs Italy to confirm qualification on 2025-11-16.
Norway did not qualify for the 2022 World Cup despite Haaland's contributions in this cycle.

club_career.notes: Season in progress as of 2026-06-23. appearances(35)/starts(34) cross-checked against 'Appearances (Sub): 35 (1)' - consistent. crosses_attempted and passes_attempted are back-calculated from completion percentages given (33% and 66%), not raw counts from source - treat as approximate.

Golden Boot tally stalled at two seasons after a December slump and a spring injury. No sub appearances noted - 31 appearances = 31 starts. crosses_attempted/passes_attempted/long_passes_attempted/dribbles_attempted back-calculated from completion percentages (33%, 67%, 67%, 39%) - approximate, not raw counts.

Won Premier League title. 31 total appearances = 29 starts + 2 sub appearances - this resolves the previously-unknown total appearance count for this season. passes_attempted/long_passes_attempted/dribbles_attempted back-calculated from completion percentages (77%, 60%, 43%) - approximate. No crosses data given for this season (source omitted it).

Debut Man City season. Record for most PL goals in a season (36) and most goals in all competitions by a PL player in one season (52). Won continental treble: Premier League, FA Cup, Champions League. 35 total appearances = 33 starts + 2 sub appearances, resolving the previously-unknown total. passes_attempted/long_passes_attempted/dribbles_attempted back-calculated from completion percentages (75%, 67%, 38%) - approximate. No crosses or free kick data given for this season.
Final season at Dortmund before transferring to Manchester City in 2022. 24 total appearances = 21 starts + 3 sub appearances.
Won DFB-Pokal in 2021. 28 total appearances = 27 starts + 1 sub appearance.
Joined January 2020 for a reported fee around €20 million, mid-season. 15 total appearances = 11 starts + 4 sub appearances.
Won Austrian Bundesliga and Austrian Cup. Departed for Dortmund in January 2020 mid-season. 14 total appearances = 11 starts + 3 sub appearances.
Joined 1 Jan 2019. Quiet beginning - largely a substitute before becoming a starter. 2 total appearances = 1 start + 1 sub appearance.

Top scorer at Molde in 2018. Won Eliteserien Breakthrough of the Year award. Missed last 3 league matches due to a sprained ankle. CORRECTED 2026-06-24: an earlier prose source had given 30 appearances / 16 goals - replaced with this structured stat table (17 starts, 12 goals), per user direction that table data takes precedence over prose-derived figures when they conflict. 25 total appearances = 17 starts + 8 sub appearances.
First senior season at Molde after joining from Bryne. 14 total appearances = 3 starts + 11 sub appearances - a very bench-heavy debut season, consistent with a teenager breaking into a first team.
Senior debut club, Norway's second tier. Joined Molde the following year. No stats found yet - needs manual lookup.

career_milestones: Fastest player in history to 50 international goals (46 appearances) for Norway
Most goals in a single Premier League season (36), 2022-23
Most goals in all competitions by a Premier League player in one season (52), 2022-23
Won continental treble with Manchester City in 2022-23 debut season
Scored in all 8 of Norway's 2026 World Cup qualifiers, including a 5-goal game vs Moldova
data_quality_notes: DATA PRECEDENCE RULE (established 2026-06-24): when a structured stat table conflicts with an earlier prose-derived figure, the table wins and the prose figure is discarded/overwritten - tables come from a stats feed and are more reliable than summary text. Always note in-line when this happens (see Molde 2018 below).

CORRECTED 2026-06-24: Molde 2018 was previously recorded as 30 appearances / 16 goals from a prose source. A structured stat table gave 17 starts / 12 goals instead, and was used to replace the old figures per the precedence rule above. Total appearances (25) was supplied separately and is consistent (17 starts + 8 sub appearances).

RESOLVED: Dortmund (3 seasons) and Salzburg (2 seasons) now have full appearances+starts: Dortmund 2019-20 (15/11), 2020-21 (28/27), 2021-22 (24/21); Salzburg 2018-19 (2/1), 2019-20 (14/11). Molde 2017 (14/3) and 2018 (25/17) also now complete. needs_breakdown flags removed from all of these - only Bryne FK 2016 remains an open gap.

SCHEMA: appearances and starts are both stored independently wherever known, never inferring one from the other. The difference (appearances - starts) is each season's sub-appearance count, noted inline where notable (e.g. Molde 2017's bench-heavy debut season).

yellow_cards/red_cards are optional fields. New 'advanced' nested object added for detailed match-data stats (xG, xA, passing, duels, defensive actions) - only populated for seasons with a detailed stat feed (currently: all 4 Man City seasons 2022-23 through 2025-26). Older/lower-profile seasons will likely never have 'advanced' data and that's expected, not a gap to chase.

Two distinct shot-tracking measurements coexist by design, not merged: top-level 'shots'/'shots_on_goal' (total shots, total on target) vs. advanced.shots_on_target_inside_box/outside_box (on-target shots split by location, Man City seasons only). These should not be added together as if equivalent.
REMAINING GAP: Bryne FK 2016 - no stats found at all, needs_breakdown: true, needs manual lookup.

Within 'advanced' blocks: any '_attempted' field paired with a '_completed' field and a percentage is back-calculated from that percentage, not a raw count from source - treat as approximate. Some seasons omit certain advanced fields entirely rather than setting them to null, since 'not reported' and 'reported as zero' are different things.
Per user instruction: shots and shots_on_goal remain optional fields, not required for every stint.
Sources: Wikipedia, NBC Sports, FOX Sports, Britannica, FotMob, WorldCupPass.com, and user-supplied stat tables (June 2026).
